name: AetherSwap
who_its_for: DeFi traders looking for low-slippage swaps on Monad testnet.
who_its_not_for: Users who need multi-chain support or fiat on-ramps.

risks.contract: Not audited by a top-tier firm — bug bounty only.
risks.structural: Novel AMM design untested at scale.

forensics.admin_function_notes: Two minor admin calls post-deployment to adjust fee tier. No upgrade proxy.

funding.source_note: Self-funded. Team holds ~1.2M MON in a multisig treasury.

founder_history.details: Lead dev previously built a Uniswap V3 fork on Arbitrum (TVL peaked ~$4M). Left after audit findings were disputed.

summary: AetherSwap is a concentrated-liquidity AMM on Monad testnet, designed for capital-efficient swaps with minimal slippage.

name: MonadLend
who_its_for: Users seeking overcollateralized lending on Monad.
who_its_not_for: Traders wanting leveraged or undercollateralized credit.

risks.contract: Audited by SigmaPrime — medium-severity findings addressed.
risks.structural: Depends heavily on MON price stability for liquidation safety.

forensics.admin_function_notes: All admin functions behind a 48h timelock. No suspicious transfers.

funding.source_note: Received 500k MON grant from Monad Foundation testnet incentive program.

founder_history.details: Core team came from a failed lending protocol on Solana. Pivoted to Monad for lower gas.
founder_history.confidence_note: Public LinkedIn profiles available for 2 of 3 founders

summary: MonadLend is a lending marketplace where users can supply assets to earn yield or borrow against collateral, inspired by Aave but optimized for Monad.

name: Nexus Perps
who_its_for: Traders who want perpetual futures on Monad.
who_its_not_for: Casual users or those unfamiliar with leverage trading risks.

risks.contract: Audited by Ackee Blockchain — critical issues found and patched.
risks.community: Strong community with active governance debates.
risks.structural: Oracle-dependent; relies on Pyth for price feeds.

forensics.admin_function_notes: No upgrade proxy — immutable after final patch. Deployed via deterministic factory.

funding.source_note: Raised $2.1M seed from Paradigm testnet cohort and angel investors. Treasury holds ~800k MON.

founder_history.details: Founders are ex-Jump Trading quant engineers. Previously built a CEX order-book matching engine. Publicly known.
founder_history.confidence_note: Verified via public LinkedIn and conference talks

summary: Nexus Perps brings perpetual futures to Monad with up to 20x leverage, a fully onchain order book, and Pyth-powered oracles.

name: Leaf Gardens
who_its_for: NFT collectors and gamers building on Monad.
who_its_not_for: Users looking for audited DeFi or stable yield.

risks.structural: Gaming mechanics still in development — roadmap risk.

funding.source_note: No known funding. Revenue comes from 5% mint fee (~300 MON collected so far).

founder_history.details: Solo anon developer. Only prior activity is a small NFT collection on Base with ~200 minted.
founder_history.confidence_note: No doxxed identity. Handle matches across Discord and X.

summary: Leaf Gardens is a gamified NFT ecosystem on Monad where players mint, stake, and battle digital flora to earn yield.

name: BaseBridge
who_its_for: Users bridging assets between Monad testnet and other testnets.
who_its_not_for: Users who need mainnet bridges or production-grade reliability.

risks.contract: Audited by Code4rena — 2 high findings resolved.
risks.structural: Relies on a committee of 3 validators — trust-minimized but not trustless.

forensics.admin_function_notes: Emergency pause function present. Triggered once on day 3, resolved within 2h.

funding.source_note: Grant from Monad ecosystem fund (~100k MON). No VC backing.

founder_history.details: Two founders previously worked at LayerZero as relayer engineers.
founder_history.confidence_note: One has a public GitHub with 4k+ contributions

summary: BaseBridge is a lightweight cross-chain bridge connecting Monad testnet to Ethereum Sepolia and Arbitrum Goerli.

name: Hive DAO
who_its_for: DAO operators launching and managing communities on Monad.
who_its_not_for: Users wanting simple token voting without governance overhead.

risks.contract: Audited by Spearbit — all findings closed.
risks.structural: Novel quadratic voting mechanism may have low participation.

forensics.admin_function_notes: All governance contracts are non-upgradeable. Timelock set to 72h. No admin keys found post-deployment.

funding.source_note: Raised $1.5M from Variant Fund and angels. Treasury holds ~600k MON + 50k USDC.

founder_history.details: Founders are ex-Compound governance contributors. One previously led MakerDAO's on-chain voting migration.
founder_history.confidence_note: Verified via Compound governance forum history and public talks

summary: Hive DAO is a DAO-launch toolkit on Monad with built-in quadratic voting, streaming treasuries, and onchain payroll.

name: Prism Money
who_its_for: Yield optimizers looking for auto-compounding strategies on Monad.
who_its_not_for: Users who prefer manual position management or low-risk savings.

risks.contract: Unaudited — team plans audit after mainnet launch.
risks.structural: Strategy vaults hold concentrated positions — high impermanent loss risk.

forensics.admin_function_notes: Vault contracts use a strategy pattern with owner-callable functions. No timelock.

funding.source_note: No public funding. ~50k MON deposited by early testers.

founder_history.details: Solo developer. Previously built yield tools on EVM (unverified claims).
founder_history.confidence_note: No public code history prior to this project

summary: Prism Money is a yield aggregator that auto-compounds user deposits across Monad DeFi protocols to maximize returns.

name: Orbit Zero
who_its_for: Developers building zero-knowledge apps on Monad.
who_its_not_for: End users who don't need privacy features or ZK verification.

risks.structural: ZK proving on Monad testnet is unoptimized — high gas costs.

forensics.admin_function_notes: Verifier contract is immutable. One post-deployment bug fix via full redeployment.

funding.source_note: Received a small Ethereum Foundation privacy grant (~$50k). Treasury holds ~150k MON.

founder_history.details: Lead dev is a PhD candidate in cryptography at ETH Zurich. Has published 3 papers on zk-SNARKs.
founder_history.confidence_note: Public Google Scholar profile and ETH Zurich faculty page

summary: Orbit Zero is a zero-knowledge proof verification layer on Monad, enabling private transactions and identity solutions.
